levels.green: Prospect confirmed specific dollar figures, volumes, or risk numbers
levels.yellow: We estimated numbers but prospect hasn't validated

factors.name: Economic Buyer
factors.description: Is the person who signs the check identified and engaged?

levels.green: EB has met with our team directly
levels.yellow: EB identified but no direct engagement

factors.name: Decision Criteria
factors.description: Do we know what they're evaluating on?

levels.green: Criteria discussed and confirmed on a call
levels.yellow: Inferred from context but not confirmed

factors.name: Decision Process
factors.description: Do we know the steps from yes to signed contract?

factors.name: Paper Process
factors.description: Do we know procurement, legal, security, and timeline?

levels.green: Mapped with specific steps and owners

factors.name: Identified Pain
factors.description: Is the pain real, quantified, and personally felt by the champion?

levels.green: Champion articulated pain in their own words with consequences

factors.name: Champion
factors.description: Do we have someone with motive, influence, access to EB, and actively selling for us?

levels.green: All four: motive + influence + EB access + active internal selling

factors.name: Competition
factors.description: Do we know who else is being evaluated and our position?

levels.green: Competitors identified, our differentiation confirmed by prospect
